backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.general_idea: Removed imports for Hibernate cache settings, Spring autowiring, build/git properties, and custom key generator that are no longer used in the class.
backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.human_impl: Removed lines: import org.hibernate.cache.jcache.ConfigSettings; import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired; import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.orm.jpa.HibernatePropertiesCustomizer; import org.springframework.boot.info.BuildProperties; import org.springframework.boot.info.GitProperties; import org.springframework.cache.interceptor.KeyGenerator; import tech.jhipster.config.cache.PrefixedKeyGenerator;

backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.general_idea: Removed fields for Git and Build properties which were previously used for cache key generation.
backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.human_impl: Removed fields: private GitProperties gitProperties; private BuildProperties buildProperties;

backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.general_idea: Removed the bean definition for HibernatePropertiesCustomizer that configured the JCache manager for Hibernate.
Replaced the list of cached entities with a new set of domain classes relevant to the current application state.
backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.human_impl: Replaced createCache calls for User/Authority with calls for Paciente, ExpedienteClinico, ConsultaMedica, Diagnostico, Tratamiento, Medicamento, Receta, CitaMedica, SignosVitales, HistorialClinico, and AuditoriaAcciones.

backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.general_idea: Removed setter methods for injecting Git and Build properties via autowiring.
backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.human_impl: Removed methods: @Autowired(required = false) public void setGitProperties(GitProperties gitProperties) { ... } and @Autowired(required = false) public void setBuildProperties(BuildProperties buildProperties) { ... }

backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.general_idea: Removed the bean definition for the custom PrefixedKeyGenerator that relied on build and git properties.
backend/src/main/java/ni/edu/mney/config.human_impl: Removed method: @Bean public KeyGenerator keyGenerator() { return new PrefixedKeyGenerator(this.gitProperties, this.buildProperties); }

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Updates the Maven property defining the Java source and target version from 17 to 21.
Changes the Jib Maven plugin base image to use a Java 21 runtime instead of Java 17.

backend/.devcontainer/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the development container base image to use Java 21 instead of Java 17.

backend/.devcontainer/devcontainer.json.general_idea: Update the development container configuration to use Java 21 instead of Java 17.

backend/.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Registers the list of domain entities in the JHipster configuration to enable code generation for them.
Adds the last Liquibase timestamp to track database schema migration state.
Configures the project to be treated as part of a monorepository structure.
Disables the installation of Git commit hooks during the generation process.

backend/src/main/docker/postgresql.yml.general_idea: Change the local PostgreSQL port mapping from 5432 to 5434 to avoid conflicts or align with new configuration.

backend/src/main/resources/config/applic.general_idea: Update the PostgreSQL connection URL to use port 5434 instead of 5432 in the development profile.
Change the PostgreSQL database connection port from 5432 to 5434 in the production configuration.
